name: Pipedream
description: Developer workflow automation platform. Monitor connected accounts and workflow access.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Pipedream at https://pipedream.com
2. Go to Settings -> Account -> API Key
3. Copy your API key
4. Paste it below

Alternatively, create an OAuth client in Settings -> API for scoped access.

checks.name: Pipedream App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Pipedream API is accessible.

checks.name: Pipedream Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies employee access to Pipedream via API.
